cards.title: Pet Care Teaches Family Parenting Skills
cards.body: Caring for a pet rabbit proved more challenging than raising children and offered unexpected lessons in nurturing. The experience demonstrates how animal care can teach patience and responsibility to families.

cards.title: Parental Guilt After Loss and Remembrance
cards.body: A widowed father finds solace reading his late wife's books with their son, creating meaningful connections. Sharing literature helps him process grief while building his relationship with his child.

cards.title: Supporting Teens Through A-Level Exams
cards.body: Parents often feel helpless when their teenagers face demanding A-level studies. The emotional toll on both parents and students during exam season reveals the unique pressures of adolescence.

cards.title: Childcare Costs and Family Financial Support
cards.body: The government is investing billions to help families afford childcare, but profiteers may be limiting access. Policymakers are addressing hidden charges that prevent families from benefiting fully.

cards.title: Family Estrangement Effects on Child Wellbeing
cards.body: Family estrangement exists on a spectrum rather than as a binary state, affecting mental health differently for each person. Support and resources play crucial roles whether families seek reconciliation.

cards.title: Indirect Therapy Helps Children Without Labels
cards.body: Working with parents rather than directly treating children can reduce distress and avoid harmful diagnostic labels. This approach creates lasting behavioral changes in everyday family life.

cards.title: Five Key Ways to Support Your Teen
cards.body: A compassionate guide helps parents navigate adolescence while strengthening connection and trust. The approach focuses on emotional balance and fostering healthy independence in teenagers.

cards.title: Hair Strand Tests Threaten Custody Access
cards.body: Growing concerns exist over how hair strand drug tests are being interpreted in family court proceedings. One mother nearly lost access to her baby due to questionable test results.

cards.title: School Minibus Collision Kills Four Children
cards.body: A tragic collision between a school minibus and train in Belgium killed two schoolchildren, their chaperone, and the driver. The incident raises questions about student transportation safety.
